description: A free, dark-mode landing page template built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No frameworks or build step. Features a scroll-aware fixed nav, animated hero, feature grid, step-by-step explainer, comparison table, contact form, and download CTA — all themeable via CSS custom properties.
name: klar-mobtimer
text:
Mob Timer is a minimal macOS landing page template built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No frameworks, no build tools — just clean, semantic markup that loads fast and stays maintainable.

The template ships with a dark-first design system using CSS custom properties, so every color, radius, and shadow can be re-themed from one place. It's fully responsive, with a scroll-aware fixed navigation, a mobile hamburger menu, and smooth-scroll anchor links.

What's included

  • Fixed navigation with scroll-aware background and active link highlighting
  • Animated hero section with parallax glows and a floating app-window mockup
  • Social proof stats bar
  • Mob programming explainer with a visual flow diagram (settings → live session)
  • Break Timer showcase with image
  • Feature card grid with hover effects and an accent highlight card
  • Three-step "How it works" section with visual mockup cards
  • Comparison table (Mob Timer vs. other timers)
  • Download CTA with password-gated modal
  • Contact form with client-side validation and success feedback
  • Footer with brand, copyright, and links
title: Mob Timer
author: Klar
